metadata.title: RiluTrip - Plan Your Perfect Trip
metadata.description: Create personalized travel itineraries with AI-powered trip planning

validation.preferencesMaxLength: Preferences must be at most 1000 characters

section1.title: Article 1. Services and Disclaimer
section1.p1: RiluTrip (hereinafter referred to as "the Site") provides AI-driven travel itinerary planning and information aggregation services.

sub1.title: Non-Licensed Travel Agency Disclaimer:
sub1.content: The Site only provides software-calculated results for travel routes, attractions, and itinerary logic. The Site "DOES NOT" engage in licensed travel agency business, such as booking flights, accommodations, visa processing, or selling tickets. Users must complete all transactions for transportation and accommodation through third-party legal platforms or providers.

sub2.title: Information Accuracy Disclaimer:
sub2.content: The itineraries generated by the Site are produced by AI models. While we strive to provide high-quality content, we cannot guarantee the absolute accuracy of business hours, ticket prices, transportation routes, or actual road conditions for any attraction. Users should independently evaluate and verify with official information before departure. The Site is not responsible for any accidents, delays, or financial losses occurring during the trip.

section2.title: Article 2. User Obligations
section2.p1: Users agree not to use the Site's services for any illegal purposes or in any illegal manner, and commit to complying with relevant laws and internet usage customs. It is prohibited to use the Site to infringe on the rights of others or engage in any unlawful activities.

section1.title: Article 1. Digital Content Refund Policy
section1.p1: The AI travel itinerary generation service provided by the Site is considered "digital content not supplied on a tangible medium or an online service completed once supplied".
section1.box: Once the user has paid, accessed the service, and completed the itinerary generation, the statutory 7-day cooling-off period does not apply, and no refunds will be provided. Please confirm your needs before purchasing.

sub1.title: Cancellation Right:
sub1.content: If you purchased a recurring subscription plan, you have the right to cancel the next month's billing at any time.

sub2.title: How to Cancel:
sub2.content: You can log into the member center at any time and click the "Cancel Subscription" button, or send a cancellation request to our customer service email at support@rilutrip.com.

sub3.title: Effective Date:
sub3.content: The cancellation instruction will take effect in the "next billing cycle". You can continue to use the full services of the Site until the end of the current billing cycle for which you have already been charged. No prorated refunds will be issued for the current period.

section1.title: Article 1. Collection and Use of Personal Data
section1.p1: To provide accurate AI itinerary planning, the Site may collect preference data you input (e.g., travel destinations, departure dates, dietary preferences) and your contact email. We collect data solely to improve AI models, send itinerary results, and provide customer service. We will never sell or provide your personal data to unauthorized third parties.

section2.title: Article 2. Third-Party Payment and Credit Card Information
section2.p1: The Site's credit card collection and recurring billing services are processed by a legal third-party payment platform in Taiwan. The Site's servers will not intercept or store your full credit card number or authorization code. All transactions are protected by SSL certificates and high-level encryption to ensure your financial security.
